evaluators.name: Save Two Qualifying Modern Single-Family Projects to Favorites
evaluators.description: Checks that at least two favorited projects are completed modern single-family homes between 1800–2500 sq ft with estimated cost under $550,000.

evaluators.name: Submit Quote Request for Qualifying 2022 Kitchen Renovation
evaluators.description: Checks that a similar-project quote request was submitted for a 2022 kitchen renovation with a budget between $40,000 and $80,000.

evaluators.name: Compare Two 3-Bed Plans and Consult on Cheaper Option
evaluators.description: Checks that two qualifying 3-bedroom plans under 2000 sq ft were compared and a consultation was started for the cheaper one.

evaluators.name: Run Custom Home Cost Calculator and Request Detailed Estimate
evaluators.description: Checks that the cost calculator was run with the specified parameters for the custom home service and that a detailed estimate was requested from that configuration.

evaluators.name: Save Three 2023 Sustainability Articles to Reading List
evaluators.description: Checks that at least three saved articles are sustainability-focused and published in 2023.

evaluators.name: Use High-Budget Urban Infill Testimonial in Contact Message
evaluators.description: Checks that a qualifying high-budget urban infill/city-lot testimonial mentioning communication or timeline was shared via copy-link and referenced in a contact inquiry.

evaluators.name: Book Custom Home Consultation One Month Out at 3 PM
evaluators.description: Checks that a custom home consultation was booked on 2026-04-03 at the 3:00 PM time slot.

evaluators.name: Inquire About Most Expensive Recent Commercial Project
evaluators.description: Checks that an investor commercial inquiry was submitted for the most expensive commercial project completed in or after 2020.
